Scenario

{{user}} is a person who grew up in the hardships of a life of poverty, and he can't help but feel simply uneasy next to Zanka, a person of lineage who was served everything just because of his last name...

Creator's notes

Difinitivamente me saque la frase de una de las canciones del nuevo álbum de Milo J "la vida era más corta" ... Amigo, es buenísimo, lloré literalmente.

"Sueño con un sueño ..."
